creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
The latest lang/rust-nightly fails to build on 12.1-RELEASE.  The build fails after about 60 minutes with this error:

running: "cc" "-O3" "-ffunction-sections" "-fdata-sections" "-fPIC" "-m64" "-ffunction-sections" "-fdata-sections" "-fPIC" "-m64" "-pipe" "-fstack-protector-strong" "-fno-strict-aliasing" "-I" "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust-nightly/work/rustc-nightly-src/build/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/stage2-tools/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/release/build/libgit2-sys-373a2c0f88e9960c/out/include" "-I" "libgit2/src" "-I" "libgit2/deps/http-parser" "-I" "libgit2/deps/pcre" "-I" "/usr/include" "-I" "/usr/include" "-fvisibility=hidden" "-DGIT_REGEX_BUILTIN=1" "-DHAVE_STDINT_H=1" "-DHAVE_MEMMOVE=1" "-DNO_RECURSE=1" "-DNEWLINE=10" "-DPOSIX_MALLOC_THRESHOLD=10" "-DLINK_SIZE=2" "-DPARENS_NEST_LIMIT=250" "-DMATCH_LIMIT=10000000" "-DMATCH_LIMIT_RECURSION=MATCH_LIMIT" "-DMAX_NAME_SIZE=32" "-DMAX_NAME_COUNT=10000" "-DSHA1DC_NO_STANDARD_INCLUDES=1" "-DSHA1DC_CUSTOM_INCLUDE_SHA1_C=\"common.h\"" "-DSHA1DC_CUSTOM_INCLUDE_UBC_CHECK_C=\"common.h\"" "-o" "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust-nightly/work/rustc-nightly-src/build/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/stage2-tools/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/release/build/libgit2-sys-373a2c0f88e9960c/out/build/libgit2/src/transports/ssh.o" "-c" "libgit2/src/transports/ssh.c"
...
cargo:warning=libgit2/src/transports/ssh.c:11:10: fatal error: 'libssh2.h' file not found
cargo:warning=#include <libssh2.h>
cargo:warning=         ^~~~~~~~~~~
...
error occurred: Command "cc" "-O3" "-ffunction-sections" "-fdata-sections" "-fPIC" "-m64" "-ffunction-sections" "-fdata-sections" "-fPIC" "-m64" "-pipe" "-fstack-protector-strong" "-fno-strict-aliasing" "-I" "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust-nightly/work/rustc-nightly-src/build/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/stage2-tools/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/release/build/libgit2-sys-373a2c0f88e9960c/out/include" "-I" "libgit2/src" "-I" "libgit2/deps/http-parser" "-I" "libgit2/deps/pcre" "-I" "/usr/include" "-I" "/usr/include" "-fvisibility=hidden" "-DGIT_REGEX_BUILTIN=1" "-DHAVE_STDINT_H=1" "-DHAVE_MEMMOVE=1" "-DNO_RECURSE=1" "-DNEWLINE=10" "-DPOSIX_MALLOC_THRESHOLD=10" "-DLINK_SIZE=2" "-DPARENS_NEST_LIMIT=250" "-DMATCH_LIMIT=10000000" "-DMATCH_LIMIT_RECURSION=MATCH_LIMIT" "-DMAX_NAME_SIZE=32" "-DMAX_NAME_COUNT=10000" "-DSHA1DC_NO_STANDARD_INCLUDES=1" "-DSHA1DC_CUSTOM_INCLUDE_SHA1_C=\"common.h\"" "-DSHA1DC_CUSTOM_INCLUDE_UBC_CHECK_C=\"common.h\"" "-o" "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust-nightly/work/rustc-nightly-src/build/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/stage2-tools/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/release/build/libgit2-sys-373a2c0f88e9960c/out/build/libgit2/src/transports/ssh.o" "-c" "libgit2/src/transports/ssh.c" with args "cc" did not execute successfully (status code exit code: 1).
...
command did not execute successfully: "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust-nightly/work/rustc-nightly-src/build/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/stage0/bin/cargo" "build" "--target" "x86_64-unknown-freebsd" "-Zbinary-dep-depinfo" "-j" "8" "-v" "--release" "--frozen" "--manifest-path" "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust-nightly/work/rustc-nightly-src/src/tools/cargo/Cargo.toml" "--message-format" "json-render-diagnostics"

I've seen this error both building from ports on a 12.1-RELEASE machine, and when using Poudriere on a 12.1-RELEASE jail.  This is with the latest from svn, version 1.44.0.20200417_1 .
